rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use annex agree {** ... **}; syntax for AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless typed ports or constants are exposed
Omit unsafe Boolean range comparisons unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL timing properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their scope in AGREE
Implementation-level bindings in component type contracts
